text:
Journal PLOS ONE ┬Ę May 2024


Automatic quantification of tumor-stroma ratio as a prognostic biomarker for pancreatic cancer


Vendittelli P, Bokhorst J-M, Smeets EMM, Kryklyva V, Brosens LAA, Verbeke C, Litjens G.


Multi-class U-Net for TSR segmentation across 368 patients / 4 datasets (25 NL labs). Dice 0.75 (epithelium) and 0.86 (tumor bulk) on external TCGA-PAAD validation. TSR AUC 0.61 for 6-month survival prediction on an independent cohort.

title: Pierpaolo Vendittelli
text:
Pierpaolo Vendittelli


Postdoc Researcher ┬Ę Medical AI & Computational Pathology


­¤ōŹ Nijmegen, The Netherlands ┬Ā┬Ę┬Ā Open to Italy ┬Ę Remote EU ┬Ę US-remote

I am Pierpaolo Vendittelli, a postdoctoral researcher developing deep-learning systems for digital pathology, spanning whole-slide image segmentation, multi-center clinical AI pipelines, prognostic modeling, and downstream applications of foundation models. My current work focuses on Wilms tumor grading at the Prinses Maxima Center for Pediatric Oncology. During my PhD at Radboud University Medical Center, I worked on pancreatic cancer prognosis, tumor segmentation, and tumor microenvironment quantification. I also design LLM-based automation tools to streamline research workflows. This portfolio brings together my publications, projects, CV, and ongoing learning log.
Open to Applied Scientist, ML Engineer, and R&D roles across medical AI and applied ML. PhD defense: June 1, 2026.

  View CV

title: Projects
text:
Personal Project ┬Ę 2024


Weekly AI Paper-Triage Agent


Multi-agent pipeline (OpenAI API, Python): weekly arXiv / PubMed scan ŌåÆ LLM summarisation ŌåÆ interest-based scoring (0ŌĆō10) ŌåÆ automated email digest. In active personal use since 2024. Demonstrates production LLM-agent design: scheduler, structured output, email delivery, and prompt-engineered relevance scoring.
Tech: Python ┬Ę OpenAI API ┬Ę Gmail API ┬Ę SQLite ┬Ę GitHub Actions
GitHub




Personal Project ┬Ę 2026


AI Job Search Agent


Automated job-hunting pipeline that fetches LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor alert emails via Gmail API, parses structured job listings, deduplicates against a SQLite store, and ranks each role 0ŌĆō1 with GPT-4o-mini against a personal r├®sum├® and preferences profile. Top matches are pushed as a ranked Telegram digest. Runs on GitHub Actions three times per day with no manual intervention.
Tech: Python ┬Ę OpenAI API ┬Ę Gmail API ┬Ę SQLite ┬Ę GitHub Actions ┬Ę Telegram Bot API
GitHub




PhD Dissertation ┬Ę Radboud University Medical Center ┬Ę 2021 ŌĆō 2024


Learning from Histopathology Images: AI-Driven Biomarkers for Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma


PhD thesis focusing on the development of artificial intelligence methods for digital pathology in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). It addresses major challenges in prognostic assessment through automated tumor segmentation, biomarker quantification, and survival prediction from whole-slide histopathology images. A central contribution is the development of robust pipelines for tumor-stroma ratio analysis and other interpretable morphological biomarkers associated with patient outcome. The work also evaluates multiple deep learning feature extraction strategies for their ability to predict overall survival across different datasets. The findings demonstrate the potential of computational pathology to improve the speed, consistency, and clinical relevance of histopathological assessment in pancreatic cancer. Overall, the thesis contributes scalable and interpretable AI-based tools that support prognostic modeling and future precision oncology research.
GitHub Download PDF




Open Source Framework


Pathology Segmentation Pipeline


A Docker-based pipeline for training and deploying deep learning segmentation models on Whole Slide Images (WSI). Built around an asynchronous tile inference engine, it supports tissue/background segmentation, multi-tissue classification, epithelium segmentation, and tumour-stroma ratio (TSR) computation for Pancreatic Cancer WSIs. The pipeline is also available as a pre-built image on DockerHub at pierpaolov93/pathology-pipeline:latest.
Tech: PyTorch ┬Ę Docker ┬Ę HuggingFace ┬Ę Python
GitHub DockerHub

Wilms Tumor Anaplasia Grading


Deep-learning and multiple-instance learning pipelines for anaplasia detection and clinical outcome prediction from pediatric kidney tumor WSIs. Multi-center dataset integration across European collaborating hospitals.
Tech: PyTorch ┬Ę MIL ┬Ę Docker ┬Ę multi-center data pipelines
GitHub




PhD Research ┬Ę Radboud UMC ┬Ę 2021 ŌĆō 2024


Automatic Quantification of Tumor-Stroma Ratio as a prognostic biomarker for pancreatic cancer.


Developed an automated whole-slide image analysis pipeline for pancreatic cancer within the EU Horizon 2020 PANCAIM consortium. Using multi-class U-Net models for tissue and tumor segmentation, the method achieved external Dice scores up to 0.86 across a multi-center cohort of 368 patients from 25 Dutch pathology laboratories. The extracted tumor-stroma ratio biomarker showed prognostic value, reaching an AUC of 0.61 for 6-month survival prediction.
Tech: PyTorch ┬Ę MONAI ┬Ę Docker ┬Ę SLURM ┬Ę Python
GitHub
